system.notes: Mil-spec gel-pack upgrade added to ANY armor: treat that armor as Hardened at its normal Ballistic and Impact ratings (a hit whose Power doesn't exceed the rating does no damage; penetration reduces the rating by 1). Halves the armor's Concealability (round down). Multiplies the base armor by: weight ×1.25, cost ×5, Street Index ×2, Availability target number ×2 and time ×4. Forbidden. Fields of Fire p.53.
